titleStmt.title: SII 20.122: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 122. (B.K. No. 46 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMĒŚVAR, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up near the Bilva tree in the Sōmēśvara temple.

summary.p: This record is dated in the king's regnal year 2, Śrīmukha, Āshāḍha, Puṇṇame, Monday, lunar eclipse, corresponding to A.D. 1153, July 6, Monday, f.d.t. 5.6. The eclipse occurred on the next day.

The inscription records a gift of money to the temple of Svayaṁbhu Dakshiṇa-Sōmanātha of rājadhāni-paṭṭaṇa Pugigere by Mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara Vīra-Pāṇḍyadēva who was the hiriya-manneya of Huligere-300, Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Jayakēsidēvarasa and the One Thousand body (parigraha) of the place for their own welfare. The gift was made over to Jñānasōma-paṇḍitadēva, the āchārya of the temple. Vīra-Pāṇḍyadēva is said to have belonged to Yadu-vaṁśa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:

ravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūḷastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē [.]
© Ōṁ namaśivāya . jayanti sthāyisucārī bhāvā
bhineyabhāvakāḥ . nīlalauhitaśailūṣabhrū
latālāsyavibhramāḥ . © svasti samadhigatapaṁcama
hāsabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ kāṁcīpuravarādhīśpa
raṁ yadvaṁśāṁbaradyumaṇi subhaṭacūḍāmaṇi
mahēṁdramaṇimakuṭakōṭivighaṭṭitanijavijaya
karakaṁkaṇaṁ līlāmātrasādhitakoṁkaṇaṁ kanakanagaśiḷātaḷasthāpita
pāṭhīnalāṁcchanajayastaṁbhaṁ dūrīkritārātivīrāvaṣṭaṁbhaṁ
tāṁbraparṇninirṇniktamauktikayuktānēkaratnākarāmu
drasamudrabhāṁḍāgāraṁ maḷayagirikaṁdaracaṁ
dananaṁdanamadhyadēsanivēsitaśriṁgārāṁgāraṁ . kiṁkarīkṟitabhūta
bētāḷamaṁḍaḷaṁ svīkritānēkaripumaṁḍaḷikamaṁḍaḷayō
grihītāhitagahanajaḷaśaiḷadurggaṁ vaṁdīkrita
vairimaṁḍaḷikavargga . śrī śaṁkaranārāyaṇadēvaca
raṇapariṇatāṁtaḥkaraṇa yādavābharaṇaṁ pāṇḍya
kuḷakamaḷamārtthaṇḍaṁ paricchēdigaṁḍaṁ rājigacōḷama
nōbhaṁgaṁ śrīmajjagadēkamalladēvapādābbabhriṁ
gaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ vīrapāṁḍyadēvaru huli
geṟemūnūṟaṟa hiriya manneyamaṁnalliya maṁne
ya jayakēsidēvanuṁ sāyiraparigrahaṁgaḷuṁ śrī
madrājadhānipaṭṭaṇaṁ puligeṟeya nagara mahājanaṁ paṁcamaṭha
sthānaṁ Āyinūrvvara mūnūṟu prabhu gāvuṇḍugaḷa
saṁvidhānadalu kālaṁ karcci hiṭṭaṁ hūsi kuḍe haḍedu
svasti śrīmaccāḷukyatraiḷōkyamalladēvavarṣada 2
neya śrīmukhasaṁvatsarada Āśāḍa suddha
puṇname sōmavāraṁ sōmagrahaṇa . byatīpā
ta dandu śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ jayakēsidēvara
saruṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ vīrapāṇḍyadēvara
saruṁ sāyiraparigrahaṁgaḷuṁ tamage pu
ṇyanimittamāgi śrīmadrājadhānipaṭṭaṇaṁ puligeṟeya
śrīsvayaṁbhudakṣiṇasōmanāthadēvara Aṁgabhō
gakkaṁ śrīgaṁndhakke taḷavritiya sūḷevolada dasava
ndhada tamage naḍeva Eṁṭṭu gadyāṇa honnumaṁ Ālliya
sdānācāryyarjñānasōmapaṇḍitadēvara kālaṁ ka
rcci dhārāpūrvakaṁ māḍi sarvvanamasya sarvvabā
dhāparihāramāgi biṭṭaru . © svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā
yō harēta vasuṁdharā saṣṭirvvarśasahasrāṇā mriṣṭāyāṁ jāya
[tē krimi ©]
Digital edition of SII 20.122 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
